_comment: Events (web sites) to monitor. Edit this file to add/remove/switch events; no code change needed. `id` is the StubHub event id (the number in the /event/<id>/ URL) and is the key used for per-event price history and alert state. Set `enabled` to false to stop monitoring an event without deleting its config.

events.label: World Cup Seattle - Jun 19, 2026 (US v Australia, Group D)
